parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor with natural movements, expressions, and lighting. There are no uncanny AI artifacts in the face, hands, or background.

characters.appearance: Young adult male with a slim build and tan complexion. He has short, spiky black hair and dark eyes. His facial features are natural and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: A beige and brown plaid button-down shirt worn open over a plain white t-shirt.

scenes.setting: A simple room with light grey walls, a white paneled door on the right, and a dark object mounted high on the left wall. The lighting is soft and even.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man stands in the center of the frame, facing the camera directly. He is positioned in a simple room with light grey walls. To his right, a white paneled door is visible. To his left, a dark, rectangular object is mounted high on the wall. The lighting is soft and even, illuminating his face clearly. He uses natural hand gestures as he speaks, occasionally raising his hand to emphasize a point.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a straightforward talking-head shot of the presenter. He speaks directly to the audience, introducing his problem and solution. Dynamic, word-by-word text overlays appear in the center of the screen, tracking his speech. A static text banner is present at the top of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I gave my accent five minutes a day. Here's what happened after two weeks.
Character A says: I used to think fixing my pronunciation would take years of classes.
Character A says: Then I found out that the real problem was just a few words.
Character A says: All it took was five minutes a day and that's less than one TikTok scroll session.

finally used my screen time for good by improving my pronunciation

scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: After two weeks, my coworkers actually noticed.
Character A says: I'm not trying to sound American, I just want to be understood the first time.
Character A says: And the best part about this, it only takes five minutes out of your day.
Character A says: Download BoldVoice now.
Character A says: Your accent doesn't need hours, it just needs the right five minutes.
